prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低位次依次为约23948→23829→23581→24080→33627，2021–2024年基本在23581–24080之间窄幅波动，2025年因招生计划大幅扩招（从1 5人增至52人）导致位次骤降至33627名，较2024年后移约9547名，2025年基准位次约33627名；该校在上海市招生计划：2021年6人、2022年12人、2023年11人、 2024年15人、2025年52人（大幅扩招247%），2026年计划57人，较2025年再扩招约9.6%，扩招幅度明显收窄，供给冲击减弱。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 新疆大学为21 1工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2025年第127名、2026年第131名，排名近年略有下降但仍属全国中上水平；该校未出现在学校声誉舆情文件中，无 明显负面或正面事件；抖音学校热度总排名第72位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等，未出现显著报考关注升温信号；未见投档线异常/断档记录；该校在第 五轮学科评估中无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科实力相对有限，对高分考生吸引力不强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在沪招生专业以计算机类、电气工程、机械工程、软件工程 等工科为主，其中计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程为2026年高热推荐专业，社会热度较高；工商管理类（含工商管理、市场营销）评估为明显劝退。上海市2026年普通高考 考生总数约66700人（较2025年综合类49276人增加约35%），考生规模大幅增长，竞争加剧；新疆大学位于新疆乌鲁木齐 市，与上海市地理距离较远，跨省报考存在地域偏好影响；该校在上海市招生占比极小（2025年52人占全国计划比例很低），属非热门跨省选择。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位 次因大幅扩招而暴跌、2026年扩招幅度收窄至9.6%、上海市考生总数大幅增加约35%以及2025年暴跌后可能出现的"回填"效应，预计2026年最低位次将较2025年有所回升（位次数 字减小，竞争加剧）。预测最低位次约34767名，区间34267–35267名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约34767名，区间34267–35267名。位次在此区间内建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如34000名以内）可重 点冲刺计算机科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化等一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如35000名以外）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次要求较低的专业。该校无A-及以上 学科评估数据，专业选择时建议更多参考社会热度与个人兴趣。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Shanghai comprehensive category were approximately 23948 → 23829 → 23581 → 24080 → 33627. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly between 23581 and 24080. In 2025, due to a significant expansion of the enrollment plan (from 15 to 52 students), the ranking dropped sharply to 33627, moving back about 9547 positions compared to 2024. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 33627. The university's enrollment plan in Shanghai: 6 students in 2021, 12 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 15 in 2024, 52 in 2025 (a 247% expansion), and 57 planned for 2026, a further expansion of about 9.6% compared to 2025, with the expansion rate significantly narrowing and supply shock weakening.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 127th in 2025 and 131st in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still at the upper-middle level nationally. The university does not appear in the school reputation sentiment files, with no significant negative or positive events. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranking is 72nd, with an evaluation of 'average', moderate short video exposure, and no significant signs of increased application attention. No abnormal admission cutoff or gap records have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no disciplines rated A- or above, with relatively limited strength in advantageous disciplines, making it less attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors in Shanghai are mainly engineering fields such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Software Engineering. Among them, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended majors for 2026 with high social popularity. Business Administration (including Business Administration and Marketing) is evaluated as clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai is about 66,700 (an increase of about 35% compared to the 49,276 comprehensive category candidates in 2025), with a significant increase in candidate numbers and intensified competition. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Shanghai geographically, with cross-province applications subject to regional preference effects. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanghai is very small (52 students in 2025, a very low share of the national plan), making it a non-popular cross-province choice.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the sharp drop in rankings in 2025 due to significant expansion, the narrowing of expansion to 9.6% in 2026, the substantial increase of about 35% in the number of Shanghai candidates, and the potential 'backfill' effect after the sharp drop in 2025, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will rebound compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases, competition intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 34767, with a range of 34267–35267.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 34767, range 34267–35267. Candidates within this ranking range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 34000) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation. Candidates near the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 35000) are advised to focus on Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. The university has no discipline evaluation data of A- or above, so when choosing majors, it is recommended to refer more to social popularity and personal interests.
